basic_details.job_title: IIM Visakhapatnam Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistants, Head Nurse and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: IIM Visakhapatnam Notification 2026 has been released on the official website for the recruitment of 4 Contract Staff posts including Assistant, Academic Associate, Head Nurse, and Assistant Manager (Accounts). This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates seeking contractual jobs in a prestigious management institute.

age_limit.age_details: Max 30 years for Posts 1 & 2, Max 35 years for Posts 3 & 4. Age relaxation applicable.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Assistant and Academic Associate posts is 30 years. Maximum age limit for Head Nurse and Assistant Manager (Accounts) posts is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules and for deserving cases.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree, Master's degree, B.Sc. Nursing, Graduation in Commerce/CA-Inter, PGDM/MBA, B.Tech/BE.
qualification.details: Assistant: Bachelor's degree in commerce for Finance & Accounts and any discipline for other areas. Experience preferably in an institute of higher education/research in the relevant areas. Academic Associate: Master Degree in the relevant discipline/Management OR Bachelor Degree in Engineering/Technology. Experience in an institute of higher education or research in the relevant area. Head Nurse: B.Sc. Nursing / DGNM from a recognised university. Minimum 5 years of clinical work experience as a nurse from a recognised institution/hospital after acquiring the required qualification. Assistant Manager (Accounts): Graduation in Commerce/CA-Inter. With minimum 5 years of work experience in any firm/institute/organisation (including articleship).

selection_process: Written test Personal interview Other assessments (online or physical mode)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Visakhapatnam Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Visakhapatnam to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Visakhapatnam Contract Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the IIM Visakhapatnam Contract Staff recruitment is 18-05-2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Contract Staff at IIM Visakhapatnam?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for Contract Staff positions at IIM Visakhapatnam. These include roles such as Head Nurse and Assistant Manager (Accounts).

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Assistant post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Assistant post is a Bachelor's degree in commerce for Finance & Accounts and any discipline for other areas. A postgraduate degree or CA Inter is preferable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Head Nurse position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Head Nurse position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules and for deserving candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for the Contract Staff positions?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly pay for the Contract Staff positions ranges from ₹30,000 to ₹45,000, depending on the specific post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for IIM Visakhapatnam Contract Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically includes a written test, a personal interview, and other assessments, which may be conducted in online or physical mode.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the official notification, no application fee is mentioned for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Andhra Pradesh apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any domicile restrictions. Therefore, candidates from any state in India who meet the eligibility criteria can apply for these positions.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contract basis. This means that the employment is for a fixed tenure as specified by the institute.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found on the careers page of the IIM Visakhapatnam official website, www.iimv.ac.in/careers. Links are also provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
